item.title: Tzumi Electronics Recalls SLF Sauna Blankets Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
item.company: In-store at Target, Macy's, and Snappy and online at Target.com from February 2025 through February 2026 for about $130.
item.brand: In-store at Target, Macy's, and Snappy and online at Target.com from February 2025 through February 2026 for about $130.
item.summary: This recall involves SLF Sauna Blankets, model number 30065TAR with serial number WF2236430065. The sauna blankets were sold in one size, measuring 70 inches long by 31 inches wide. The sauna blankets are black with white accent handles and were sold with a control panel and wireless remote to adjust the time and temperature.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: SLF Sauna Blankets.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled Sauna Blankets immediately and contact Tzumi Electronics for a replacement. Consumers should visit www.tzumi.com/recalls to confirm eligibility. If confirmed, unplug the sauna blanket, cut the power cord, write "Recalled" on the sauna blanket controller and submit photos showing the serial number and "Recalled" marking per the instructions at www.tzumi.com/recalls.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
